name: bt_attach_assets
description: JS deps for editors/liveview. CodeMirror 6 powers the cockpit's code editor (BT-2538); it is BUNDLED into priv/static/assets/app.js by esbuild, so the shipped release stays npm-free — only the build needs node (provisioned via .tool-versions / mise). playwright is test-only, for the browser e2e suite (mix test --only playwright). See README 'Assets'.
